creator: mita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
I, as a maintainer of japanese/vfghostscript5, noticed that some modification
to this port had been performed WITH NO INFORMATION to me.  Actually, this 
causes a severe incompatibility of Laser printer from Epson co, therefore it 
imposes a enormous inconvenience to the users (like myself, 3 days before 
my Ph.D pre-defence ;-)

I strongly recommend to solve the problem immediately by appling 
the patch attached below to the current japanese/vfghostscript5
